title: Cozy Campfire
description: Adds a warm-aura mechanic around lit campfires. Stand near a campfire for a few seconds to receive Regeneration I as a cozy comfort bonus
body:
Ever wished that sitting by a campfire in Minecraft actually did something?

Cozy Campfire adds a simple but атмосферная mechanic:
when you stay near a lit campfire, it gently restores your health - just like relaxing by a warm fire should.

No complexity, no unnecessary features - just a small detail that makes your world feel more alive.

Features
> - Stand within 5 blocks of a lit campfire
> - Stay nearby for 3 seconds
> - Receive Regeneration I
> - Effect is maintained while you remain close
> - Timer resets if you walk away
> - Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer
> - Lightweight and performance-friendly

This mod is designed to feel natural and balanced:
> - Encourages players to rest and recover
> - Perfect for early-game survival
> - Great for building cozy camps, villages, or roleplay setups
> - Does not overpower combat or progression
